headline: Baxter (BAX) Stock After Recent Rebound Is The Discount To DCF Value Warranted
summary: Wondering whether Baxter International at US$20.86 is a bargain or a value trap? This article breaks down what the current share price might be telling you about the stock. The stock has risen 7.6% over the past week and 20.6% over the past month, yet is still down 7.0% year to date and has declined 31.3% over the last year. This raises questions about how the market now views its risk and potential. Recent coverage has focused on Baxter International's position within the medical equipment...
